hero.pitch: 4+ years building modern web solutions with JavaScript. Expert in React, Next.js and AI-assisted development. B2 English certified.

about.title: About me
about.body: I am a frontend developer with 4+ years of experience building real products — from interactive UIs to scalable backend services. I specialize in the JavaScript ecosystem, focused on React and Next.js. I work with agile teams, expert in prompt engineering and AI-assisted development. B2 English certified.

contact.title: Let's connect
contact.body: Open to interesting opportunities. I can also guide you through your remote job search.

services_page.title: Services
services_page.subtitle: Learn to land remote jobs with personalized coaching
services_page.why_1: Real experience in the international remote job market
services_page.why_2: Personalized process based on your profile and goals
services_page.why_3: Continuous follow-up between sessions via WhatsApp
services_page.cta_body: Tell me about yourself and we will design the path to your first remote job together.
